highlights.description: Streaming support via Bedrock ConverseStream API
Full tool/function calling with streaming tool deltas
Simplified authentication with Bedrock API keys (`AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_BEDROCK`)
Comprehensive test suite: 18 unit tests + 8 integration tests

added.description: Streaming support via `CreateChatCompletionStream` using Bedrock's ConverseStream API
`stream.go` with event handling for text deltas, tool use deltas, and metadata
Tool choice options: auto, required, none, specific tool
Streaming tool call support with incremental argument delivery
Bearer token authentication via `AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_BEDROCK` environment variable
Integration tests (8 tests) covering completions, streaming, and tool calling
Unit tests (18 tests) with mock Bedrock client
CI/CD documentation for GitHub Actions with both auth methods

changed.description: README.md updated with credential chain priority table
README.md updated with testing documentation and environment variables
Bedrock model access section simplified (AWS auto-enables models on first invocation)

dependencies.description: Added `github.com/aws/smithy-go` as direct dependency for bearer token support

documentation.description: Added AWS authentication priority table with 7 credential sources
Added Bedrock API key setup instructions
Added Testing section with unit and integration test commands
Added CI/CD examples for GitHub Actions

internal.description: Added `.gitignore` for credentials and IDE files

added.description: Core chat completion support via Bedrock Converse API
System message handling (extracted to Bedrock system blocks)
